title: chore(deps): update dependency shelljs to v0.8.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| shelljs | devDependencies | patch | `0.8.1` -> `0.8.2` | [source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>shelljs/shelljs</summary>

### [`v0.8.2`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v082httpsgithubcomshelljsshelljstreev082-2018-05-08)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2)

[Full Changelog](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2)

**Closed issues:**

-   High severity vulnerability in shelljs 0.8.1 [#​842](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/842)
-   Add test for ls() on a symlink to a directory [#​795](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/795)
-   Harden shell.exec by writing the child process in a source file [#​782](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/782)
-   shell.exec() doesn't respond correctly to config.fatal = true [#​735](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/735)
-   Merge 'exec: internal error' with ShellJSInternalError [#​734](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/734)
-   exec returning null from command [#​724](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/724)
-   Only Get Stderr from Exec [#​371](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/371)
-   Execute child.stdout.on before child.on("exit")  [#​224](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/issues/224)

**Merged pull requests:**

-   Workaround codecov bug of miscalculation of coverage (#​795) [#​838](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/pull/838) ([dwi2](https://renovatebot.com/gh/dwi2))
-   Update doc comments and regenerate README.md. [#​825](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/pull/825) ([Zearin](https://renovatebot.com/gh/Zearin))
-   chore: update contributing guidelines [#​817](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/pull/817) ([nfischer](https://renovatebot.com/gh/nfischer))
-   chore(lint): don't allow excess trailing newlines [#​816](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/pull/816) ([nfischer](https://renovatebot.com/gh/nfischer))
-   Remove separate "internal error" from exec [#​802](https://renovatebot.com/gh/shelljs/shelljs/pull/802) ([freitagbr](https://renovatebot.com/gh/freitagbr))

</details>
